Actually, I’ve got some great information today!
It's called The Gyeonggi Pass,
a policy that gives partial transportation refunds
If you're a resident of Gyeonggi Province, anyone who uses it
more than 15 times a month

will get a 30% refund if you're between 19 and 39 years old,
and a 20% refund if you're 40 or older
(Children and teenagers (ages 6-18) get a 100% refund!!) Students, even if they don't use it 15 times,
(A limit of 60,000 won per quarter) can still get up to 240,000 won refunded annually!
